prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、能源 动力等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业设置齐全，对考生吸引力较强；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对陕西考生有一定跨省吸引力；2025年该校在陕招生占比约1.84%，属中等偏下水平，非主要生源省份。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 15182 → 14733 → 11676 → 11854 → 14320. In 2023, it significantly moved forward to 11676, remained basically stable in 2024, and notably moved back to 14320 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2644 over the past two years, showing large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 14320; the university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Shaanxi: 2021: 96 → 2022: 101 → 2023: 110 → 2024: 117 → 2025: 120 → 2026: 122, expanding enrollment for six consecutive years, with an increase of 2 (+1.7%) from 2025 to 2026, slightly easing competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, science and engineering category; Soft Science China University Rankings: 2021: 58th → 2022: 48th → 2023: 52nd → 2024: 48th → 2025: 48th → 2026: 62nd, with a slight decline in 2026 but still in the top 100 nationally, upper-middle tier; no significant public opinion incidents recorded in reputation data, overall reputation stable; Douyin popularity not in the top 100 nationally, attention level average; no records of enrollment gaps, stable application expectations. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering as traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, energy and power engineering continue to have high social popularity, and the university offers a comprehensive set of related majors, attracting strong interest from candidates; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Shaanxi candidates; in 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi was about 1.84%, at a medium-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 14320, a slight enrollment expansion of 2 (+1.7%) in 2026, a significant increase of about 19.7% in Shaanxi Physics Category candidates, and a slight decline in university ranking, both supply and demand indicate intensified competition. Combined with the strongest driving factor of a large expansion in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 14663, with a range of 14163–15163.
